columns.description: The unique key for each customer.
columns.name: customer_id

compiled_code:
with

source as (

    select * from shaman.raw.raw_customers

),

renamed as (

    select

        ----------  ids
        id as customer_id,

        ---------- text
        name as customer_name

    from source

)

select * from renamed
description: Customer data with basic cleaning and transformation applied, one row per customer.
label: stg_customers
name: stg_customers
raw_code:
with

source as (

    select * from {{ source('ecom', 'raw_customers') }}

),

    select

        ----------  ids

        ---------- text
        name as customer_name

    from source

)
